notes: Model identification is evidenced by the staged-replay golden (summary.model_name; events.jsonl carries state transitions only — no metrics frames). This recording is essentially the basic-turn arc; the user-observable assertion is that SessionMetrics.ModelName is non-empty (and not 'unknown') after the first assistant event lands, and ContextWindow is populated from raw.context_management.context_window (or the alias table). The phase DSL only asserts state arcs and event kinds; the model/context assertions are evidenced by the staged-replay golden, not by separate phases. Assert ModelName/ContextWindow only AFTER turn_end (per the assessment caveat: ContextWindow may briefly read 0 between session detection and the first assistant event).

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName is the normalized launch model (not 'unknown') and ContextWindow is populated from raw.context_management.context_window or the alias table
